Notice And Motion To Dismiss For Lack Of Subject Matter Jurisdiction Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jun-17-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alexis Davidson, esq. (415-447-2833) of The Michael Law Firm for Plaintiff.
Andrew K. Jacobson, esq. (510-208-5500) of Bay Oak Law for Defendant.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT ARRIBA JUNTOS' Motion To Dismiss For Lack Of Subject Matter Jurisdiction is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
